reviews.review_description: I beatted the game in less than 20 min, looks good but very short ...:(
Looks amazing, but it could be significantly longer for what you are paying.

Heres the deal. The graphics are great. The levels are diverse and theres even a part that made me jump ( I scare easily). This game is short so if you're wanting hours of entertainment this is not for you. However if you want great graphics challenging levels and an overall quality game this  IS for you.

reviews.review_title: I love this game, make me fell inside it
reviews.review_description: The game is short, but woouu it worth the money. It put you to concentrate in part of the game and zassss surprise!! In specs: the graphics are good, good design of place, many details, is very confortable, run smooth, have a little history, and is like an japanese anime. Wait... the monsters are kinda of funny i love that. You make my day in litle time thanks!
Very boring game. I was expecting some nice problem solving and dungeon crawling. This is for 5 year old.
I cant believe i have wasted my money on this 4 mins of play was enough for me. Buy dead halls inatead far much more enjoyable.
Go see my rebiew this is good game

You did good with this and i mean good. Now i cane across audio issue that it tends to mess up when shooting and im not using bluetooth but cord headset. I went through the stages and now going to work on 3 star. I would love to give you another idea to make that will catch attention on Gear VR
